materials: Circulo's Alpaya Yarn - 3 hanks of off white, 2 hanks of teal, - 2 hanks of light blue
Blocking mat or thick towel and pins

rounds.rawInstruction: With off white, ch 114
rounds.summary: Create a foundation chain of 114 stitches with off white yarn.
rounds.title: Foundation Chain

rounds.rawInstruction: 1 sc in the 2nd ch from the hook and in each ch across. (113 sc) Ch 1, turn.
rounds.summary: Work single crochet across the foundation chain.
rounds.title: Row 1

rounds.rawInstruction: 1 sc in each sc across, changing to teal in the last sc. Ch 1, turn.
rounds.summary: Single crochet across, changing to teal at the end.
rounds.title: Row 2

rounds.rawInstruction: 1 sc in each sc across. Ch 1, turn.
rounds.summary: Single crochet across.
rounds.title: Row 3

rounds.rawInstruction: 1 sc in each sc across, changing to off white in the last sc. Ch 1, turn.
rounds.summary: Single crochet across, changing to off white at the end.
rounds.title: Row 4

rounds.rawInstruction: 1 sc in the first 2 sc,*fpdc around the next sc from 3 rows below (see reference image), then - back on your working row - sk the sc behind the fpdc you just made, 1 sc in each of the next 2 sc;* repeat from * to * across. Ch 1, turn.
rounds.summary: Work a pattern of single crochets and front post double crochets.
rounds.title: Row 5

rounds.rawInstruction: 1 sc in each st across, changing to light blue in the last sc. Ch 1, turn.
rounds.summary: Single crochet across, changing to light blue at the end.
rounds.title: Row 6

rounds.rawInstruction: 1 sc in each sc across. Ch 1, turn.
rounds.summary: Single crochet across.
rounds.title: Row 7

rounds.rawInstruction: 1 sc in each sc across, changing to off white in the last sc. Ch 1, turn.
rounds.summary: Single crochet across, changing to off white at the end.
rounds.title: Row 8

rounds.rawInstruction: 1 sc in the first 2 sc,*fpdc around the top of the fpdc from 4 rows below, then - back on your working row - sk the sc behind the fpdc you just made, 1 sc in each of the next 2 sc;* repeat from * to * across. Ch 1, turn.
rounds.summary: Work a pattern of single crochets and front post double crochets.
rounds.title: Row 9

rounds.rawInstruction: 1 sc in each sc across,changing to teal in the last sc. Ch 1, turn.
rounds.summary: Single crochet across, changing to teal at the end.
rounds.title: Row 10

rounds.rawInstruction: 1 sc in each sc across. Ch 1, turn.
rounds.summary: Single crochet across.
rounds.title: Row 11

rounds.rawInstruction: 1 sc in each sc across, changing to off white in the last sc. Ch 1, turn.
rounds.summary: Single crochet across, changing to off white at the end.
rounds.title: Row 12

rounds.rawInstruction: 1 sc in the first 2 sc,*fpdc around the top of the fpdc from 4 rows below, then - back on your working row - sk the sc behind the fpdc you just made, 1 sc in each of the next 2 sc;* repeat from * to * across. Ch 1, turn.
rounds.summary: Work a pattern of single crochets and front post double crochets.
rounds.title: Row 13

rounds.rawInstruction: Repeat Rows 6-13 until you have a total of 118 rows.
rounds.summary: Cycle through rows 6-13 until the blanket reaches 118 rows.
rounds.title: Repeat Rows 6-13

rounds.rawInstruction: Then ch 1, turn, and do one more row of sc.
rounds.summary: Work one final row of single crochet.
rounds.title: Final Row

rounds.rawInstruction: Weave in ends, then move on to the border.
rounds.summary: Weave in yarn ends from the main body.
rounds.title: Weave in ends

rounds.rawInstruction: With off white, place one sc evenly around the entire blanket. Place 3 sc in each corner. *Tip: while working along the sides, place two sc for each colored row, so 2 sc per white row, 2 sc for each teal row, etc. This way you won't be adding unnecessary single crochets to the sides which could result in a wavy edge. Join with sl st to the first sc you made.
rounds.summary: Work a round of single crochet around the blanket, increasing at corners.
rounds.title: Round 1

rounds.rawInstruction: Finish off white, add teal.
rounds.summary: Cut and secure off white yarn, attach teal yarn.
rounds.title: Finish off white, add teal.

rounds.rawInstruction: Ch 2, 1 hdc in each st around, placing 3 hdc in each corner. Join with a sl st to the first hdc. Finish off teal, add light blue.
rounds.summary: Work a round of half double crochet around, increasing at corners.
rounds.title: Round 2

rounds.rawInstruction: Ch 1, 1 sc in each st around, place 3 sc in each corner. Join with a sl st to the first sc. Finish off. Weave in ends.
rounds.summary: Work a final round of single crochet around, increasing at corners.
rounds.title: Round 3
